case_title: JUAN HERNANDEZ TORRES VS. DELPHINE EARL GRAHAM

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, JUAN HERNANDEZ AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, DELPHINE EARL AKA D. EARL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA STONE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
